Special Effect Flags

Mini-bossYes
Rare modeRandom rare effect enabledThis enemy can roll from the rare-effect families exposed by the client cache.
Effect poolAttacker, Speeder
Loot source modelSpawner-linked loot

Enabled rare families: Attacker - The name suggests an offense-oriented rare roll. The client cache does not expose the exact damage or refire multiplier. | Speeder - The name suggests a movement-focused rare roll. The client cache does not expose the exact speed or chase-range multiplier.
